issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling for data fetching failures or missing pages.
Dockerfile uses official node image without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Migrate Marketing Site to Next.js
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the SSG/SSR/CSR classification, App Router generateStaticParams + revalidate, and the grep-based audit for window/localStorage; baseline uses Pages Router APIs and skips the audit step.

scenarios.name: Hydration Mismatch + Authenticated SSR Fetch
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact cookies().toString() forwarding pattern and the use client + useEffect deferral example from the skill; baseline gestures at the concepts but lacks the concrete Next.js APIs.
